CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2016 Continued To Mar-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT APPLE AMERICAN GROUP, LLC ("AAG")'S Motion To Strike is off calendar in light of the ruling on defendant's demurrer.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT APPLE AMERICAN GROUP, LLC ("AAG")'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Continued To Feb-03-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2015 Continued To Oct-21-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-29-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Stephen R. Jaffe, of The Jaffe Law Firm LLP, Tel. 415.618.0100, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT APPLE AMERICAN GROUP, LLC ("AAG")'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/JMQ)
